global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, abstract shapes, and clear messaging about cashback offers.
global.main_message: Sign up for cashback rewards with ClearLedger.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A prominent logo at the top of the ad, featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold, modern font against a blue background.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, rendered in a light blue color, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: A clear and bold text block at the bottom, stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller subtext 'Fast signup, instant card' in a contrasting color.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: ClearLedger headline
elements.description: The headline text 'ClearLedger' is displayed prominently at the top, designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A call-to-action button at the bottom of the ad, featuring the text 'Shop now' in a bold font, designed to encourage immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: ClearLedger, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, cashback offer.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by abstract shapes in the center, with body text at the bottom and a CTA button.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Fast signup, instant card, ClearLedger, Shop now
